name: Coconut Joys
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan and remove from heat.
2. Add powdered sugar and coconut to the melted butter, mixing well.
3. Shape rounded teaspoons of the mixture into balls.
4. Make an indent in the center of each ball and place on a cookie sheet.
5. Fill the centers with melted chocolate.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Store in the refrigerator. Makes 3 dozen.
Note: There is no sugar added to the unsweetened chocolate, as the surrounding candy mixture is sweet enough.
